category_sources: source_facts.description says swtpm is a Software TPM Emulator based on libtpms.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.repo use the official name swtpm.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official repository; its wiki and README are official documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a TPM emulator based on libtpms; source_facts.executables lists TPM-related tools.
